channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-11522] sanity-sec test_27 defect: unable to remount client if run with FILESET set
item.description:
tests]# NAME=ncli FILESET=/subdir ONLY=27 sh sanity-sec.sh
lm0118: lm0118: executing check_logdir /tmp/test_logs/1539623033
lm0111: lm0111: executing check_logdir /tmp/test_logs/1539623033
lm0115: lm0115: executing check_logdir /tmp/test_logs/1539623033
lm0117: lm0117: executing check_logdir /tmp/test_logs/1539623033
Logging to local directory: /tmp/test_logs/1539623033
lm0115: lm0115: executing yml_node
lm0118: lm0118: executing yml_node
lm0117: lm0117: executing yml_node
lm0111: lm0111: executing yml_node
Client: Lustre version: 2.11.0_140_ge358bda_dirty
MDS: Lustre version: 2.11.0_140_ge358bda_dirty
OSS: Lustre version: 2.11.0_140_ge358bda_dirty
Skipping tests:         17   18   19   20   21   22   23   27                 26
lm0117: lm0117: executing check_config_client /mnt/lustre
lm0118: lm0118: executing check_config_client /mnt/lustre
lm0118: Checking config lustre mounted on /mnt/lustre
lm0117: Checking config lustre mounted on /mnt/lustre
Checking servers environments
Checking clients lm0117,lm0118 environments
Using TIMEOUT=20
disable quota as required
lm0118: lm0118: executing set_default_debug vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck all 4
lm0111: lm0111: executing set_default_debug vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck all 4
lm0115: lm0115: executing set_default_debug vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck all 4
osd-ldiskfs.track_declares_assert=1
osd-ldiskfs.track_declares_assert=1
without GSS support
excepting tests: 17 18 19 20 21 22 23 27
skipping tests SLOW=no: 26


== sanity-sec test 27: test fileset in various nodemaps ============================================== 17:04:10 (1539623050)
Exercising fileset for nodemap default
On MGS 192.168.1.11, active = nodemap.active=1
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, active = nodemap.active=0
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, active = nodemap.active=0
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, active = nodemap.active=0
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, active = nodemap.active=0
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, active = nodemap.active=1
waited 4 seconds for sync
On MGS 192.168.1.11, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=1
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=0
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=0
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=0
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=0
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=0
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=1
waited 5 seconds for sync
On MGS 192.168.1.11, default.trusted_nodemap = nodemap.default.trusted_nodemap=1
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, default.trusted_nodemap = nodemap.default.trusted_nodemap=1
waited 0 seconds for sync
ldlm.namespaces.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ffff880134e8d000.lru_size=clear
ldlm.namespaces.lustre-MDT0001-mdc-ffff880134e8d000.lru_size=clear
On MGS 192.168.1.11, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=0
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=1
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=1
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=1
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=1
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=0
waited 4 seconds for sync
On MGS 192.168.1.11, default.trusted_nodemap = nodemap.default.trusted_nodemap=0
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, default.trusted_nodemap = nodemap.default.trusted_nodemap=0
waited 0 seconds for sync
On lm0111 192.168.1.11, default.fileset = nodemap.default.fileset=
On lm0111 192.168.1.11, default.fileset = nodemap.default.fileset=
On lm0111 192.168.1.11, default.fileset = nodemap.default.fileset=
On lm0111 192.168.1.11, default.fileset = nodemap.default.fileset=
On lm0111 192.168.1.11, default.fileset = nodemap.default.fileset=/subdir_default
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, default.fileset = nodemap.default.fileset=
On lm0111 192.168.1.11, default.fileset = nodemap.default.fileset=/subdir_default
On lm0115 192.168.1.15, default.fileset = nodemap.default.fileset=/subdir_default
waited 5 seconds for sync
Stopping clients: lm0117 /mnt/lustre (opts:)
Stopping client lm0117 /mnt/lustre opts:
Starting client lm0117:  -o user_xattr,flock lm0111@tcp:/lustre/ /mnt/lustre
mount.lustre: mount lm0111@tcp:/lustre at /mnt/lustre failed: No such file or directory
Is the MGS specification correct?
Is the filesystem name correct?
If upgrading, is the copied client log valid? (see upgrade docs)
 sanity-sec test_27: @@@@@@ FAIL: unable to remount client lm0117
item.summary: sanity-sec test_27 defect: unable to remount client if run with FILESET set

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Oleg Drokin (green@whamcloud.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/33389/
Subject: LU-11522 tests: sanity-sec/27 unable to remount client
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 5f3b0966d4d42154e2d390292d4455fc70531e2d

Elena Gryaznova (c17455@cray.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/33389
Subject: LU-11522 tests: sanity-sec/27 unable to remount client
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: b465772239b6257d6219cd311bef9e4c93a43c24
